# Getting help with DRIFT

Thanks for trying DRIFT. Quick guide to where each kind of question goes:

## 🐛 Bug reports
Use the **[Issues tab](https://github.com/itselliott/drift/issues/new/choose)** and pick "Bug report". The template asks for version + OS + repro steps — fill those out and it gets fixed faster.

Easier path: launch DRIFT, open the **About overlay** (the `i` button in the header), and click **Report a Bug**. It opens your mail client with everything pre-filled (version, OS, sample rate, current preset/mode/state).

## 💡 Feature requests
Use the **[Issues tab](https://github.com/itselliott/drift/issues/new/choose)** and pick "Feature request". Tell me what you want and what workflow you're trying to support.

## 💬 Questions / discussion
Use **[Discussions](https://github.com/itselliott/drift/discussions)** for:
- "How do I…"
- "Is this expected?"
- "What does this preset do?"
- Sharing patches, demos, ideas

## 📧 Private
For anything you'd rather not post publicly: **elliottdevs@gmail.com**.

## 🔄 Stay updated
Click **Watch → Releases only** at the top of the repo. GitHub will email you when DRIFT updates.
